items.title_en: Defense giant KNDS plans IPO in Paris and Frankfurt
items.title_zh: 国防巨头 KNDS 计划在巴黎和法兰克福首次公开募股
items.desc_en: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.
items.desc_zh: KNDS 计划在巴黎和法兰克福上市，现有股东预计将出售最多 20% 的现有股本。

items.title_en: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
items.title_zh: 随着商业化加速，摩根士丹利将中国仿人机器人出货量预测提高一倍
items.desc_en: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.
items.desc_zh: 随着现实场景中早期商业部署的加速，摩根士丹利大幅提高了对中国仿人机器人市场的展望。

items.title_en: Oil extends decline as Trump accuses oil firms of 'gouging' consumers
items.title_zh: 特朗普指责石油公司“欺骗”消费者，油价延续跌势
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
items.desc_zh: 在近期原油价格下跌后，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普加大了对石油公司降低汽油价格的压力。

items.title_en: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼支持的候选人在纽约民主党初选中大获全胜
items.desc_en: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.
items.desc_zh: 布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 在一场竞选中击败丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman)，暴露了该市在以色列-加沙战争问题上的分歧。

items.title_en: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
items.title_zh: 乌克兰正在增加俄罗斯的战争成本——并考验普京的决心
items.desc_en: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.
items.desc_zh: 在与俄罗斯的长期战争中，一系列政治胜利和深度打击成功增强了人们对乌克兰的信心。

items.title_en: Bondi Beach shooting hero pleads not guilty to alleged assault on his father
items.title_zh: 邦迪海滩枪击英雄对袭击父亲的指控不认罪
items.desc_en: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.
items.desc_zh: 艾哈迈德·艾哈迈德 (Ahmed al Ahmed) 在 12 月的一场犹太活动中击毙了一名枪手，该枪手杀害了 15 人。

items.title_en: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, rebuking Trump's war with Iran
items.title_zh: 国会首次通过战争权力措施，谴责特朗普与伊朗的战争
items.desc_en: The resolution is largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.
items.desc_zh: 该决议在很大程度上是象征性的，但它增加了白宫一劳永逸结束冲突的压力。

items.title_en: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼支持的三名纽约民主党人赢得众议院初选； 2名现任者落选
items.desc_en: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.
items.desc_zh: 美国民主社会主义者支持的两名候选人赢得了初选，一年前，民主社会党支持的佐兰·马姆达尼赢得了纽约市长竞选。

items.title_en: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
items.title_zh: VIX 所有者 Cboe 进军预测市场，以推动零日期权增长
items.desc_en: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.
items.desc_zh: 全球市场运营商 Cboe 推出了首款预测市场产品，以满足快速增长行业的消费者需求。

items.title_en: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
items.title_zh: 悉尼女子遭鲨鱼袭击一周多后从昏迷中醒来
items.desc_en: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.
items.desc_zh: 34 岁的利亚·斯图尔特 (Leah Stewart) 在库吉海滩游泳时被咬伤，一只手臂被截肢。

items.title_en: Asian tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung up 9%
items.title_zh: 全球股市暴跌后亚洲科技股反弹；三星股价上涨9%
items.desc_en: Asia's technology stocks rebounded on Wednesday after global equities posted steep losses in the previous session.
items.desc_zh: 在全球股市前一交易日大幅下跌后，亚洲科技股周三反弹。

items.title_en: Anthropic’s Mythos model found vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government systems, official says: AP
items.title_zh: 官员称，Anthropic 的 Mythos 模型发现了美国政府机密系统中的漏洞：美联社
items.desc_en: A U.S. official told The Associated Press on Tuesday that one of Anthropic's artificial intelligence models had identified vulnerabilities in highly sensitive and secure U.S. government computer syste
items.desc_zh: 一名美国官员周二告诉美联社，Anthropic 的一个人工智能模型发现了高度敏感和安全的美国政府计算机系统中的漏洞

items.title_en: Eight sentenced to 450 years in prison over anti-ICE riot where officer was shot
items.title_zh: 八人因反 ICE 骚乱导致警员被枪杀而被判处 450 年监禁
items.desc_en: An officer was shot in the neck during the Texas disorder by "Antifa Cell operatives", prosecutors said.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，在得克萨斯州骚乱期间，一名警官被“Antifa Cell”特工开枪射中颈部。

items.title_en: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解
items.desc_en: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.
items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
items.title_zh: Alphabet 取代 Verizon 加入道琼斯工业平均指数
items.desc_en: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet 将取代 Verizon 在道琼斯工业平均指数中的地位。

items.title_en: Swimio
items.title_zh: Swimio
items.desc_en: AI swim coach with Apple Watch tracking & smart workouts
items.desc_zh: 具有 Apple Watch 追踪功能和智能锻炼功能的 AI 游泳教练

items.title_en: Germany rail network comes to complete halt nationwide due to IT malfunction
items.title_zh: 由于IT故障，德国铁路网络在全国范围内完全停止
items.desc_en: Rail company Deutsche Bahn has paused train services across the country due to a nationwide IT disruption.
items.desc_zh: 由于全国范围内的 IT 中断，铁路公司德国铁路公司已暂停全国范围内的火车服务。

items.title_en: E-commerce giant Alibaba sues US government over defence blacklist
items.title_zh: 电子商务巨头阿里巴巴就国防黑名单起诉美国政府
items.desc_en: The e-commerce giant is suing the US defence department after it was added to a blacklist of firms with ties to the Chinese military.
items.desc_zh: 这家电子商务巨头被列入与中国军方有联系的公司黑名单后，正在起诉美国国防部。

items.title_en: South Korea's stock market just had one of its worst days ever. Why Morgan Stanley says it's not breaking down
items.title_zh: 韩国股市刚刚经历了有史以来最糟糕的日子之一。为什么摩根士丹利说它没有崩溃
items.desc_en: The Kospi index fell about 10% in Tuesday's session, marking its worst session since March.
items.desc_zh: Kospi 指数周二盘中下跌约 10%，创下 3 月份以来最糟糕的盘日。

items.title_en: Cerebras falls 8% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
items.title_zh: Cerebras 股价下跌 8%，此前芯片制造商在 IPO 以来的首份收益报告中预测利润率将萎缩
items.desc_en: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.
items.desc_zh: Cerebras 于 5 月在纳斯达克上市，让华尔街有机会接触一家纯粹的人工智能公司。

items.title_en: Micron leads the big tech sell-off. What the charts show about the next big catalyst
items.title_zh: 美光科技引领科技股大跌。图表显示了下一个重大催化剂的内容
items.desc_en: We can gain valuable insight when we look at longer-term trends that help us rise above the inevitable near-term noise in this secular AI-driven bull market.
items.desc_zh: 当我们关注长期趋势时，我们可以获得宝贵的见解，帮助我们超越这个由人工智能驱动的长期牛市中不可避免的近期噪音。

items.title_en: FUTO Swipe
items.title_zh: FUTO Swipe
items.desc_en: Open models for on-device swipe typing
items.desc_zh: 用于设备上滑动打字的开放模型

items.title_en: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.title_zh: 卢比奥警告不要过路费 联合国表示将疏散滞留在霍尔木兹海峡的水手
items.desc_en: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.
items.desc_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥警告伊朗，任何国家都不能向通过该海峡的船只收取费用。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We're at one of Europe's biggest tech events.
items.desc_zh: 我们正在参加欧洲最大的科技活动之一。

items.title_en: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
items.title_zh: IPO后不到两周，SpaceX通过发债筹集了250亿美元
items.desc_en: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士称，在接到价值近 900 亿美元的订单后，SpaceX 通过发债筹集了 250 亿美元。

items.title_en: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
items.desc_en: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
items.desc_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称，以色列军队在战斗平息后在黎巴嫩南部打死两人
items.desc_en: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方称这两人是真主党特工，但伊朗支持的组织指责其违反停火协议。

items.title_en: US top court says Rastafarian man cannot sue prison guards who cut his dreadlocks
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院称拉斯特法里男子不能起诉剪掉他辫子的狱警
items.desc_en: The Rastafarian man argued his religious rights were violated after prison officials focibly shaved off his hair.
items.desc_zh: 这名拉斯特法里教男子辩称，监狱官员强行剃掉他的头发后，他的宗教权利受到侵犯。

items.title_en: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.desc_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title_en: Dr Kalam OS
items.title_zh: Dr Kalam OS
items.desc_en: A premium, portable, localized live workstation in pendrive.
items.desc_zh: 优质、便携式、本地化的随身碟式实时工作站。

items.title_en: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
items.title_zh: 赞比亚前总统的家人在关于他的尸体应该如何处理的最新法律诉讼中获胜
items.desc_en: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remain in dispute 12 months after he died.
items.desc_zh: 埃德加·伦古 (Edgar Lungu) 去世 12 个月后，他的家人与赞比亚政府仍存在争议。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: Off Autopilot
items.title_zh: Off Autopilot
items.desc_en: Curated, human-written articles about agentic coding
items.desc_zh: 关于代理编码的精选、人工撰写的文章

items.title_en: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
items.title_zh: 联合国调查委员会称以色列故意针对儿童在加沙实施种族灭绝
items.desc_en: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".
items.desc_zh: 以色列拒绝接受三人专家小组的新报告，称其为“诽谤性的骗局”。

items.title_en: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇热浪高峰，法国溺水死亡人数激增
items.desc_en: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
items.desc_zh: 法国总理塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努表示，自上周四以来，法国已有 40 人因热浪而溺水身亡。

items.title_en: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚发现蜘蛛利用弹簧陷阱捕捉猎物
items.desc_en: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员表示，它们的狩猎方法——这使得它们能够捕食危险的蚂蚁——是前所未有的。

items.title_en: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
items.title_zh: 随着纽约竞选成为焦点，周二初选有五件事值得关注
items.desc_en: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 周二在纽约、马里兰州和犹他州举行的初选将考验外部资金、政党权力以及佐兰·马姆达尼和唐纳德·特朗普的影响力。

items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.title_en: Do you know your 'sweat score'? The rise of hydration tech
items.title_zh: 你知道你的“汗水分数”吗？补水技术的兴起

items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: It's not just about nudity warns actress - the complex reality of images and online abuse
items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实
items.desc_en: Tech companies and authorities are failing women by focusing on nudity rather than consent, says a report by Chayn.
items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: How the social media ban could reshape how all of us use the internet
items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令如何重塑我们所有人使用互联网的方式
items.desc_en: Why some argue the social media ban could have a profound affect on how young people gain new knowledge and the rest of us move around online
items.desc_zh: 为什么有些人认为社交媒体禁令可能会对年轻人获取新知识以及我们其他人在网上活动的方式产生深远影响

items.title_en: New video game console aims to get kids moving
items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The Nex Playground will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: Nex Playground 将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。
